info.name: TrustPost
info.description:
Trust-Post REST API collection.

Setup:
1. baseUrl defaults to http://localhost:3001/api/v1
2. Run auth/login — accessToken is auto-saved to collection variables
3. All protected requests use the collection-level Bearer token

Note: logout, logout-all, refresh, and sessions endpoints require the httpOnly refresh cookie set by the login response.

variable.description: Email verification token from verification email
Password reset token from reset email
OAuth state parameter for CSRF protection

request.description: Rate limited: 3 requests per minute.
accessToken is auto-saved on success. Rate limited: 5 per minute.
Requires refresh token cookie. Clears the current session.
Terminates all sessions. Requires refresh token cookie.
Uses refresh token cookie. Returns a new accessToken.
UUID is sent in the verification email. Redirects to frontend on success.
Rate limited: 3 per minute.
Sends a password reset email. Rate limited: 3 per minute.
Token is from the reset-password email link.
Open in a browser. Replace 'google' with any supported OAuth provider (google, github, etc). x-device-id header is required. Optional query params: redirectTo, deviceId.
OAuth callback endpoint. Replace 'google' with provider name. Automatically called by OAuth provider. Redirects to frontend with auth token.
Lists active sessions. Requires refresh token cookie.
Requires refresh token cookie.
Keeps current session only. Requires refresh token cookie.
Requires refresh token cookie.
All fields optional. At least one must be provided.
Permanently deletes the authenticated user account.
title: 10–100 chars. content: 50–2000 chars. targetDate must be in the future.
Toggles like status. No body required.
Owner only. Both fields optional.
Owner only. status: ARCHIVED or COMPLETED.
Owner only.
Requires MODERATOR or ADMIN role.
Requires MODERATOR or ADMIN role.
Requires ADMIN role.
Owner only.
Requires MODERATOR role.
Toggles like status. No body required.
Owner only. Use after uploading via POST /files/post/images. Storage and Cloudinary path are resolved on the server.
Owner only.
Owner only. No body required.
PRIVATE: exactly one participantId required.
GROUP chats only. Returns 400 for PRIVATE chats.
Soft-delete per user (removes the user from the chat).
Marks all messages as read for the current user.
Creates or returns the existing chat linked to a post.
Add a verified user to a group or post chat by their email address. Requester must be a chat member.
Send a message with optional file attachments (max 10 files). Uses multipart/form-data.

query.description: Cursor for pagination (message ID or timestamp). Leave empty for first page.

request.description: Own messages only.
Own messages only.
Own message files only.

formdata.description: JPEG, PNG, GIF or WebP. Max 5 MB each, up to 10 files.
Required for post/chat uploads. Omit for profile uploads.

request.description: Returns uploaded file metadata. Supported targets: post, chat, profile. Server resolves storage and Cloudinary path internally.

formdata.description: PDF, DOC or DOCX. Max 20 MB each, up to 5 files.

request.description: Use `post`, `chat`, or `profile` in the URL target segment. Do not send storage or file path from the client.
Idempotency-Key header is required. message is optional. Returns a WayForPay payment URL.
No auth required. Idempotency-Key header is required. donorEmail, donorName, message are optional.
provider is optional.
Requires ADMIN role. Retries failed comments moderation jobs. Body can be empty.
Requires ADMIN role.
Requires ADMIN role. role is optional (USER | MODERATOR | ADMIN).
Requires ADMIN role.
Activates or deactivates the user. Requires ADMIN role. No body needed.
Requires ADMIN role. Values: USER | MODERATOR | ADMIN.
Requires ADMIN role.
Requires ADMIN role. Deletes multiple users by UUID array.
Requires ADMIN role. Removes all files linked to a post.
Requires ADMIN role.
Not under /api/v1 prefix.
Prometheus-format endpoint. Scraped by Prometheus in the docker-compose setup.
